{{Quote|Sure you're a tourist — you're not fooling me, so give me ''another'' 50 credits. Hurry up so I can get out of here.|Putten Beatus|<ref name="GG7" />}}
'''Putten Beatus''' was a [[near-Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]]. She was an outcast who found work as a customs inspector at the Mos Eisley Spaceport. She was different from a normal [[Human/Legends|Human]] by her gray skin and large ears. Because of her looks, she was known to attract quite a few stares.

==Sources==
